title: Opening for Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the ICICI Bank International Enterprises family as a Financial Analyst in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
